items.target_text: Vessel not under command, keep clear.
accepted_answers: Vessel not under command, keep clear.

accepted_answers: Vessel towing, tow length two hundred metres.

accepted_answers: Fishing vessel, fishing gear deployed, keep clear.

items.source_text: Ведутся водолазные работы, держитесь на безопасном расстоянии.
items.target_text: Diving operations in progress, keep safe passing distance.
accepted_answers: Diving operations in progress, keep safe passing distance.

items.target_text: Dredging operations, safe passage on starboard side.
accepted_answers: Dredging operations, safe passage on starboard side.

items.source_text: Судно не управляется, не пересекайте перед носом.
items.target_text: Vessel not under command, do not cross ahead.
accepted_answers: Vessel not under command, do not cross ahead.

items.target_text: One person injured, medical assistance required.
accepted_answers: One person injured, medical assistance required.

items.source_text: Человек без сознания, требуется немедленная медицинская помощь.
items.target_text: Person unconscious, immediate medical assistance required.
accepted_answers: Person unconscious, immediate medical assistance required.

items.source_text: Подозрение на переохлаждение, первая помощь оказывается.
items.target_text: Suspected hypothermia, first aid being given.
accepted_answers: Suspected hypothermia, first aid being given.

items.source_text: Двигатель снова запущен, временный ремонт держится.
accepted_answers: Engine restarted, temporary repair is holding.

accepted_answers: Steering restored, proceeding at reduced speed.

items.target_text: Water ingress reduced, continuing to monitor.
accepted_answers: Water ingress reduced, continuing to monitor.

items.target_text: Medical evacuation not required, advice needed.
accepted_answers: Medical evacuation not required, advice needed.

items.source_text: Временный ремонт выполняется, помощь пока не требуется.
items.target_text: Temporary repair underway, assistance not required at present.
accepted_answers: Temporary repair underway, assistance not required at present.

items.target_text: Mayday relay received, unable to assist.

items.source_text: Обломки замечены рядом с последним известным местоположением.

accepted_answers: Debris sighted near last known position.

accepted_answers: Securite, gale warning in area Alpha.
sécurité gale warning in area Alpha

accepted_answers: Heavy swell, small craft keep clear.

accepted_answers: Report weather update every thirty minutes.

accepted_answers: Thunderstorm in area Bravo, avoid the area.

accepted_answers: Shore power available on berth Bravo two.

accepted_answers: Pump-out station unavailable until one five zero zero UTC.

accepted_answers: Aurora is alongside berth Bravo two

accepted_answers: Altering course to starboard to pass astern.

accepted_answers: Securite, visibility less than one mile in area Charlie.

accepted_answers: Mayday, taking water, position five miles east of Alpha.

accepted_answers: Rescue unit, reading back five miles east of Alpha.

examples: My position is two cables south of the marina.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Station called + this is + vessel name
examples: Marina Control, this is sailing yacht Aurora.

grammar_patterns.pattern: My heading is + three-digit heading + degrees
examples: My heading is zero nine zero degrees.
My ETA is one four zero zero UTC.
I will pass astern of you.

grammar_patterns.pattern: I am altering course to + direction
examples: I am altering course to starboard.

grammar_patterns.pattern: I am navigating in + visibility condition
examples: I am navigating in restricted visibility.
I read you loud and clear.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Called station + this is + vessel name
examples: Aurora, this is sailing yacht Orion.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Stand by on channel + channel number
examples: Stand by on channel one six.
Wait out, I will call you again.
Correction, my ETA is one five zero zero UTC.

grammar_patterns.pattern: I spell + identifier + spelling alphabet sequence
examples: I spell Aurora: Alfa Uniform Romeo Oscar Romeo Alfa.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Marina station + this is + vessel name
examples: Marina Control, this is sailing yacht Orion.
Stand by outside the harbour entrance.
I am arriving from the south.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Request + service one + and + service two

examples: Proceed to berth Bravo one two.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Stand by outside + location + for berth assignment
examples: Stand by outside the marina entrance for berth assignment.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Proceed to berth + berth number + side to
examples: Proceed to berth three, port side to.
After taking fuel, proceed to your berth.
Depart when the fairway is clear.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Approach + manner + and keep + mooring item + ready
examples: Approach slowly and keep fenders ready.

grammar_patterns.pattern: My position is + distance + direction + reference
examples: My position is two nautical miles north of the marina.

grammar_patterns.pattern: My position is + direction + reporting point
examples: My position is east of reporting point Alpha.
I am passing reporting point Alpha.
I am abeam reporting point Bravo.
My heading is zero nine zero degrees.
My course is zero nine zero degrees.
Bearing to marina is two seven zero degrees.

grammar_patterns.pattern: My course is + course + speed + speed value
examples: My course is zero nine zero, speed five knots.
Distance is three nautical miles to the marina.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Distance is + decimal distance + unit + reference
examples: Distance is one decimal five nautical miles to the reporting point.
My ETA is one four zero zero UTC.
ETA update: one five zero zero UTC.

grammar_patterns.pattern: ETA at + reporting point + is + time + UTC
examples: ETA at reporting point Alpha is one four three zero UTC.

grammar_patterns.pattern: I will report at + reporting point
examples: I will report at reporting point Alpha.
Correction, ETA one five zero zero UTC.

grammar_patterns.pattern: My position is on the + side + side of the channel
examples: My position is on the port side of the channel.

grammar_patterns.pattern: My position is + decimal distance + direction + reporting point
examples: My position is one decimal five nautical miles west of reporting point Bravo.
Read back course zero nine zero and speed five knots.
Read back ETA one four zero zero UTC and position.
Correction, position two cables north of the marina.
Correction, course zero nine zero, speed five knots.
ETA update: one five zero zero UTC, speed five knots.
Report: position reporting point Alpha, course zero nine zero, speed five knots.
Securite, navigation warning on channel one six.
Securite, weather warning: strong wind from north.
Restricted visibility in the marina approach.
Hazard two cables north of the marina.
Navigation warning: obstruction in the channel.
Keep listening watch on channel one six.
Safety information valid until one four zero zero UTC.
Warning: obstruction east of the breakwater.
Visibility less than two nautical miles.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Securite three times + navigation warning + obstruction position
examples: Securite, Securite, Securite, navigation warning: obstruction two cables north of reporting point Alpha.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Securite + weather warning + wind + sea state
examples: Securite, weather warning: strong wind from north, sea state rough.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Navigation warning + restricted visibility + location + time
examples: Navigation warning: restricted visibility in the approach channel until one four zero zero UTC.
Hazard: bearing zero nine zero, distance two cables.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Read back safety warning + channel + time
examples: Read back safety warning, channel one six, one four zero zero UTC.
Correction, obstruction two cables east of the breakwater.
Keep listening watch until one five zero zero UTC.
I will alter course to starboard.

grammar_patterns.pattern: authority station + this is + vessel identity
examples: VTS, this is sailing yacht Aurora.
I am at reporting point Alpha.
Report when passing reporting point Alpha.

grammar_patterns.pattern: request permission/clearance to enter or leave port
request or report pilot/tug service status
VTS movement instruction: proceed, hold, wait, keep clear

examples: Traffic information: outbound vessel in fairway.

grammar_patterns.pattern: procedure word + authority station + exact channel
pilot status report or report trigger

examples: I take over the bridge watch.

grammar_patterns.pattern: steady on course + radio course value
examples: Steady on course zero nine zero.

grammar_patterns.pattern: anchor readiness or action on command
make fast or let go + line position

examples: My position is four five five zero north, zero one three one zero east.

grammar_patterns.pattern: distress position by bearing and distance
examples: My position is bearing zero nine zero, distance two miles from the lighthouse.
We are abandoning vessel to liferaft.

grammar_patterns.pattern: read back distress position and nature
examples: Read back position and nature of distress.

grammar_patterns.pattern: complete Mayday call with identity position nature and assistance
examples: Mayday, this is vessel Aurora, position bearing zero nine zero from the lighthouse, fire on board, I require immediate assistance.

grammar_patterns.pattern: explicit contrast between radio signal families
equipment failure with no immediate danger
urgency status with explicit non-distress boundary

examples: Disabled vessel position bearing zero nine zero, two miles from the lighthouse.
Engine restarted, assistance no longer required.
Cancel Pan-Pan, assistance no longer required.
Radio failure, keeping listening watch on channel one six.
Vessel not under command, keep clear.
Vessel restricted in her ability to manoeuvre, dredging operations.
Vessel constrained by her draught, keeping to deep-water channel.
Vessel towing, tow length two hundred metres.
Fishing vessel, fishing gear deployed, keep clear.
Diving operations in progress, keep safe passing distance.
Dredging operations, safe passage on starboard side.
Vessel not under command, do not cross ahead.
Vessel constrained by her draught, do not impede passage.
One person injured, medical assistance required.
Person unconscious, immediate medical assistance required.
Suspected hypothermia, first aid being given.

grammar_patterns.pattern: engine recovery with temporary repair holding

examples: Steering restored, proceeding at reduced speed.
Water ingress reduced, continuing to monitor.
Medical evacuation not required, advice needed.

grammar_patterns.pattern: medical situation with no immediate danger
temporary repair underway without current assistance request
examples: Temporary repair underway, assistance not required at present.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Mayday relay acknowledgement with assistance capability
examples: Mayday relay received, unable to assist.

grammar_patterns.pattern: SAR request for last known position
examples: Report last known position of vessel in distress.

grammar_patterns.pattern: SAR search area with direction and reference position
examples: Search area north of last known position.
Rescue helicopter overhead, prepare for evacuation.
Rescue boat approaching from starboard side.

grammar_patterns.pattern: SAR listening watch on channel one six
examples: Keep listening watch for SAR traffic on channel one six.

grammar_patterns.pattern: debris sighting near last known position
examples: Debris sighted near last known position.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Securite weather warning with named area
examples: Securite, gale warning in area Alpha.

grammar_patterns.pattern: restricted visibility limit with caution instruction
examples: Visibility less than one mile, navigate with caution.

grammar_patterns.pattern: dense fog with required sound signal
heavy swell warning for small craft
examples: Heavy swell, small craft keep clear.
Report weather update every thirty minutes.

grammar_patterns.pattern: rough sea state with caution instruction
examples: Sea state rough, proceed with caution.

grammar_patterns.pattern: fog bank position with lookout instruction

examples: Thunderstorm in area Bravo, avoid the area.

grammar_patterns.pattern: fuel berth occupied with wait-outside instruction
examples: Fuel berth occupied, wait outside marina.

grammar_patterns.pattern: proceed to service pontoon for a specific service
examples: Proceed to service pontoon for water.

grammar_patterns.pattern: shore power availability on named berth
examples: Shore power available on berth Bravo two.
Pump-out station unavailable until one five zero zero UTC.

grammar_patterns.pattern: contact payment office on working channel
examples: Contact payment office on channel one two.
After payment, proceed to visitor berth.
Repair berth available after one six zero zero UTC.

grammar_patterns.pattern: water hose ready on vessel side
examples: Water hose ready on starboard side.

grammar_patterns.pattern: marina service completion with return to assigned berth
examples: Marina service complete, return to assigned berth.

grammar_patterns.pattern: waiting pontoon full with outside stand-by
examples: Waiting pontoon full, stand by outside harbour.

grammar_patterns.pattern: station call with vessel identity and approach direction
examples: Marina Alpha, sailing yacht Aurora approaching from south.

grammar_patterns.pattern: request a visitor berth for a duration
examples: Request visitor berth for one night.

grammar_patterns.pattern: proceed to named berth with side-to instruction
examples: Proceed to berth Bravo two, starboard side to.

grammar_patterns.pattern: spoken readback of named berth and side-to instruction
examples: Reading back berth Bravo two, starboard side to.

grammar_patterns.pattern: traffic crossing description with relative position
alter course to side to pass ahead or astern
examples: Altering course to starboard to pass astern.

grammar_patterns.pattern: spoken VTS order to switch channel
examples: VTS, switch to channel one two.
Securite, visibility less than one mile in area Charlie.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Pan-Pan equipment failure with position reference
examples: Pan-Pan, engine failed, position near buoy seven.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Mayday nature of distress with relative position
examples: Mayday, taking water, position five miles east of Alpha.

grammar_patterns.pattern: spoken rescue-unit readback of distress position
examples: Rescue unit, reading back five miles east of Alpha.

grammar_patterns.pattern: confirm clear status and passing relation
spoken report of passing a named point

examples: Read back, switch to channel one two.
Steering limited, keeping starboard side of fairway.

grammar_patterns.pattern: read back signal and assistance request
examples: Read back Pan-Pan, request tow to harbour.

scenarios.situation_ru: Вам нужна помощь и вы передаете короткий запрос.
